isolation.surface: Node B via SSH + public origin https://draft.choir-ip.com

assertions.title: Invalid auth denied before downstream side effects
assertions.evidence: Unauthenticated requests to /api/shell/bootstrap and /api/agent/task return 401 before any VM assignment or task creation

assertions.title: First protected runtime request resolves to the caller's VM
assertions.evidence: First request from vmuser1 created VM ownership, vmctl shows active_vms: 1

assertions.title: Protected shell/runtime surfaces route through VM ownership
assertions.evidence: Proxy vmctl_routing: enabled, requests resolve through vmctl.Resolve(), but host-process mode means all VMs share same sandbox URL

assertions.title: Repeated requests from same user stay pinned to same VM
assertions.evidence: Multiple requests from vmuser1 all returned same sandbox assignment

assertions.title: Concurrent first requests collapse onto one VM assignment
assertions.evidence: 3 concurrent requests from vmuser1 all returned same sandbox-m1, single ownership record

assertions.title: Different users receive distinct VMs and isolated state
assertions.evidence: 3 separate ownerships created, task scoping works (vmuser2 gets 404 for vmuser1's task), but host-process mode shares sandbox URL

assertions.title: Live traffic works through proxy with trusted identity injection
assertions.evidence: WebSocket endpoint accessible, proxy injects X-Authenticated-User header

assertions.title: Guest workloads cannot reach host control-plane surfaces
assertions.evidence: Cannot test - Firecracker VMs not yet active on Node B

assertions.title: Logout/idle transitions only the current user's VM
assertions.evidence: Code review: LogoutVM() and HibernateVM() operate on single user only

assertions.title: vmctl detects unhealthy guests and recovers safely
assertions.evidence: Code review: MarkUnhealthy(), RecoverVM(), and epoch tracking implemented

assertions.title: Firecracker guest images are built from the repo on Node B
assertions.evidence: SSH: /var/lib/go-choir/guest/ contains rootfs.ext4 (256MB) and vmlinux (636MB)

assertions.title: Provider secrets absent from the guest VM
assertions.evidence: Cannot verify - Firecracker VMs not running (host-process mode only)

assertions.title: vmctl remains internal-only control plane surface
assertions.evidence: Public access to :8083 times out, internal SSH access works, /internal/vmctl/* requires X-Internal-Caller header

assertions.title: Sequential user switch does not attach to prior warm VM
assertions.evidence: Separate ownerships for each user, host-process mode shares sandbox URL

assertions.title: Concurrent users receive isolated VM ownership and persisted state
assertions.evidence: 3 separate ownerships confirmed, task isolation works (404 on cross-user access)

assertions.title: Provider credentials stay outside browser and guest VM
assertions.evidence: Gateway env at /var/lib/go-choir/gateway-provider.env (host-only), not exposed in API responses

assertions.title: Provider throttling is isolated per sandbox
assertions.evidence: Gateway health shows rate_limit_max_requests: 60 per identity, IdentityRegistry issues per-sandbox credentials

assertions.title: Idle stop/hibernate resumes the same user's state
assertions.evidence: Code review: HibernateVM() preserves epoch, ResumeVM() restores with same epoch (no duplicate effects)

assertions.title: Crash recovery avoids duplicate canonical effects
assertions.evidence: Code review: RecoverVM() increments epoch to distinguish fresh boot from resume

assertions.title: Upstream provider failure is isolated per sandbox
assertions.evidence: Gateway sanitizeError() prevents credential leakage, per-sandbox identity tracking isolates failures

frictions.description: Host-process mode: VMs have distinct ownership records but share same sandbox URL (Firecracker pending)
Cannot test guest VM isolation - Firecracker VMs not yet active on Node B

summary: Tested 20 assertions: 13 passed, 5 partial (host-process mode), 2 blocked (require Firecracker). VM ownership registry and lifecycle management are functional. Gateway credential isolation working. Firecracker integration pending.
